result:
# Comparison: React Server Components vs Traditional SSR

## Overview

React Server Components (RSC) represent a paradigm shift in how React applications handle rendering...

## Key Differences

| Aspect | RSC | Traditional SSR |
|--------|-----|-----------------|
| Rendering | Server-only components | Full component tree |
| Client Bundle | Smaller (no server components) | Larger |
| Data Fetching | Direct DB access | API calls |
| Interactivity | Client components only | Full hydration |

## When to Use RSC

- Content-heavy pages
- Database-heavy operations
- Sensitive data handling

## When to Use Traditional SSR

- High interactivity needs
- Real-time updates
- Complex client state

sources.title: Server Components
sources.content: Server Components allow you to render components on the server...
